overall.description: Cinematic game footage from a third-person horror game, showing a character exploring a rain-soaked urban street at night. The scene features heavy atmospheric fog, neon signage, abandoned vehicles, and a dark, suspenseful atmosphere with the character wielding a flashlight and handgun.

segments.scene_description: The clip opens on a dark, rain-soaked urban street with a prominent vertical neon sign. Heavy fog obscures the sky as the camera moves forward, transitioning to a third-person view of a character holding a flashlight and handgun, exploring the deserted street.

segments.scene_description: The character moves into a park-like area with bare trees and iron fences. The BATTERY sign and parked car fall behind as the path opens up, with apartment buildings visible in the foggy distance and wet leaves covering the ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza area with phone booth and benches near neon-lit buildings

segments.scene_description: The character approaches an illuminated phone booth and green benches as red neon lights pierce through the fog in the background. Construction barrels appear in the distance, and an abandoned yellow taxi sits parked near the curb.

scene_state.functional_zone: construction zone with traffic barriers approaching commercial building

events.description: character slows and turns slightly toward the brightly lit building entrance

agents.ego_description: navigating around construction barriers toward the neon-lit building entrance

abandoned yellow taxi cab parked on the street

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the phone booth and navigates through a construction zone with orange barrels and traffic cones. The red neon building looms larger as the character approaches, passing an abandoned yellow taxi and heading toward the illuminated entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, neon-lit urban street into a desolate, fog-shrouded park. It begins on a rain-soaked road dominated by a prominent vertical neon sign, moving forward as the perspective shifts to a third-person view of a character armed with a flashlight and handgun. As the character advances, the glow of the BATTERY sign and a parked car recede into the background, and the urban concrete gives way to a park-like area. The scene then opens up to reveal bare trees, iron fences, and a ground covered in wet leaves, before finally settling on a view of distant apartment buildings looming through the heavy fog.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked street that transitions from a foggy roadside into a looming urban construction zone. It begins with the character approaching an illuminated phone booth and green benches, while red neon lights pierce through the dense fog in the background. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts toward a cluster of orange construction barrels and traffic cones, passing an abandoned yellow taxi parked by the curb. The red neon building then looms larger and more imposing as the character navigates through the debris, finally heading toward the brightly lit entrance.
